_README: pendpost brand-lint rules. EDIT THIS FILE freely - it is the live rule set. To disable a rule, delete its object (or flip severity to "warn"). To add one, append an object. Schema: { id: string, severity: "error"|"warn", matcher: {regex,flags} | "<builtin>", hint: string }. A regex matcher runs against the caption text; flags default to "g". A string matcher names a built-in in lib/lint.mjs MATCHERS (captionLength, hashtagCount, allCaps, brokenLink) - those are platform-aware. The shipped default ships at the install root; a copy at the workspace root (rules.json next to your .env) overrides it. errors block publish; warns are advisory. See site-docs for the full reference.

rules.hint: This link is empty or malformed (a bare scheme or an empty markdown link). Give it a real destination or remove it.
Caption is over the platform's cap and will be truncated at publish. Trim it or split the thought.
That is a lot of hashtags - reads as spammy and platforms down-rank tag stuffing. Keep a tight, relevant set.
Long ALL-CAPS runs read as shouting and hurt accessibility (screen readers spell them out). Use sentence case and let the words carry the weight.
Em/en dashes are a tell of AI-written copy and overuse reads as breathless. Use a comma, a period, or restructure.

matcher.regex: \b(delve|leverage|seamless(?:ly)?|synerg(?:y|ies|istic)|robust|deep dive|at the heart of|stands as a testament|navigate the landscape|in today'?s fast-?paced world)\b

rules.hint: Classic AI-vocabulary. Say it plainly: 'leverage' -> 'use', 'delve into' -> 'look at', 'seamless' -> 'smooth' (or cut it).
The 'it's not just X, it's Y' construction is an AI tic. State the point directly instead of building it up.
Three-item lists ('fast, simple, and reliable') are padding when reflexive. Keep the one word that earns its place.

matcher.regex: \b(very|really|actually|basically|literally|simply|quite|in order to|that being said|at the end of the day)\b

rules.hint: Filler and hedging dilute the line. Delete it - the sentence is almost always stronger without.
Promotional puffery reads as a press release. Show the concrete thing it does instead of claiming it is amazing.
